answer: Samples with a sequencing depth below 5000 were filtered out of the dataset because they were considered too small to be statistically useful. The threshold value was 5000 reads per sample.
The 515Y and 926R universal rRNA gene primers were used. The 515Y forward primer sequence is GTGYCAGCMGCCGCGGTAA and the 926R reverse primer sequence is CCGYCAATTYMTTTRAGTTT.
FRAM Strait samples in GRUMP were sequenced using MiSeq technology (2 x 300 bp), which differed from most other cruises that used HiSeq Rapid Run technology (2 x 250 bp).
The MOSAiC samples were sequenced using MiSeq technology (2 x 300 bp) — the same platform used for FRAM.
The PRJNA accession for the BioGEOTRACES GA02 samples is PRJNA1194189 (shared with GA10).
